name: picoclaw-traffic-guardian
description: Picoclaw runtime traffic monitoring baseline for lightweight AI gateway proxy inspection, egress detection, and posture integration.
author: prompt-security

files.description: Picoclaw traffic guardian skill instructions and operating model
Human-oriented overview and builder handoff notes
Version history and baseline release notes
Implementation specification for Picoclaw runtime traffic monitoring
Placeholder for shared detector, profile, and report code
Placeholder for lifecycle, status, and profile export scripts

execution.persistence: Spec baseline only. Builders must keep monitoring opt-in and scheduler-free unless an operator explicitly applies one.
execution.network_egress: Future runtime will proxy operator-scoped Picoclaw gateway traffic. No runtime network behavior is implemented in v0.0.1.

operator_review: Do not merge proxy runtime into picoclaw-security-guardian or picoclaw-self-pen-testing.
Export traffic-monitor status for picoclaw-security-guardian to profile and drift-check, but keep runtime ownership in this skill.
Do not install a system-wide CA automatically.
Default to detect-and-log mode; blocking is out of scope for v0.0.1 implementation.
Redact secret snippets before writing logs or profile summaries.
